name: Iso11783IL_OPChangeListItem
title: Iso11783IL_OPChangeListItem
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPChangeListItem( dword inputID, dword index, dword itemID ); // form 1
description: The function changes an item in an input list object. A Change List Item command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: inputID
parameters.description: Object ID of the input list object
